title: Better Nether For More Ancient Debris
description: Better Nether for More Ancient Debris makes Ancient Debris easier to find by highlighting Nether blocks and adding a unique blue variant for Netherite gear.
body:
Better Nether for More Ancient Debris is a Minecraft resource pack designed to make hunting Ancient Debris in the Nether much easier.
It tweaks the textures of Gravel, Blackstone, Soul Sand, Soul Soil, Nether Quartz Ore, and Nether Gold Ore so they stand out — helping you quickly identify blocks that could hide Ancient Debris nearby.

Plus, it adds a special Blue Ancient Debris texture, giving your Netherite gear a fresh, eye-catching look. Perfect for miners who want efficiency without sacrificing style!
